item.title: How to creat Hugo Site
item.description: Hugo + Git-page 创建Hugo Site # Run these commands to create a Hugo site with the [Ananke](https://github.com/theNewDynamic/gohugo-theme-ananke) theme. hugo new site quickstart cd quickstart git init git submodule add https://github.com/theNewDynamic/gohugo-theme-ananke.git themes/ananke echo "theme = 'ananke'" >> hugo.toml hugo server 如何部署到Git-page # 执行 hugo --theme=hugo-sustain -b="https://code-agree.github.io/" hugo --theme=hugo-sustain --baseURL="https://code-agree.github.io/" # 执行上述操作会在根目录下创建public/目录 ls -l total 8 drwxr-xr-x 3 root staff 96 12 27 22:25 archetypes drwxr-xr-x 2 root staff 64 12 27 22:25 assets -rw-r--r-- 1 root staff 1063 12 27 22:55 config.

item.title: Markdown Syntax Guide
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.

item.title: Markdown Syntax Guide
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.

item.title: Math Typesetting
item.description: Mathematical notation in a Hugo project can be enabled by using third party JavaScript libraries.

item.title: Emoji Support
item.description: Emoji can be enabled in a Hugo project in a number of ways.
